description: Renders a single highlighted callout block with optional title and icon.
uiDescription: Shows a rounded message panel with a tinted background, a subtle border, and an optional icon chip at the left.
generationNotes: Use this for a single highlighted note, warning, tip, or announcement.
The body should stay short and focused, usually one to three short paragraphs or bullets.
Use the tone attribute to match the meaning: info, success, warning, or error.
useCases: Important notes, launch highlights, tips, warnings, success states, and summary messages.
Avoid using it for long multi-section content or dense comparisons.

fewShotExamples.intent: Show a warning before a migration step.
